footer.description: Kayan aiki na kyauta don masu haɓaka yanar gizo, masu zane-zane, da ƙwararrun tallace-tallace.

desktopOnly.title: Wannan kayan aiki yana aiki a kan babban allo
desktopOnly.description: Don amfani da shi cikin sauƙi, buɗe wannan kayan aiki a kan kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka, kwamfutar tebur, ko na’ura mai kwakwalwa a yanayin kwance.
desktopOnly.tipText: Idan kana amfani da na’ura mai kwakwalwa, juya ta zuwa yanayin kwance – idan faɗin tagar ya isa, kayan aiki zai yi aiki ta atomatik.

cookie.title: Kukis da sirri
cookie.description: Muna amfani da kukis don gudanar da shafin, nazarin zirga-zirga, da nuna tallace-tallace. Ƙarin bayani a cikin
cookie.essentialDescription: Shafin ba zai iya aiki ba tare da waɗannan. Ba sa tattara bayanan tallace-tallace.
cookie.analyticsDescription: Ƙididdiga na ziyarce-ziyarce. Yana kunna Google Analytics 4 da yarjejeniyar ku.
cookie.changeDecision: Kuna iya canza shawarar ku a kowane lokaci

contactForm.subjectPlaceholder: misali Rahoton kuskure | Shawarar kayan aiki | Tambaya
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Bayyana tambayar ku ko shawarar ku...
contactForm.error: Wani abu bai yi daidai ba. Da fatan za a duba bayanan ku kuma a sake gwadawa.
contactForm.success: An aika saƙon! Za mu amsa da wuri-wuri.

infoBanner.text: Sabuntawar mai ƙirƙira sa hannun imel – duba sabbin damar
